category_sources: Official Cube documentation describes the CLI as used for Cube workflows including creating Cube services and generating data models.
source_facts.description says this is the Cube.js command-line interface.
display_name_sources: Official Cube CLI documentation uses npx cubejs-cli examples.
docs_sources: Official Cube documentation has a CLI command reference page.
Official Cube documentation has a dedicated CLI page.
repo_sources: The cubejs-cli npm metadata lists github.com/cube-js/cube as the repository, and official Cube docs link issue reporting to cube-js/cube.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was researched.
